entities.name: SESAME
entities.description: Indian sesame (Sesamum indicum L.) cultivars used for characterization

entities.name: SEED STORAGE PROTEIN MARKERS
entities.description: Soluble protein markers used to assess divergence and characterization, less sensitive to environmental fluctuation

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FLUCTUATION
entities.description: External environmental changes that can affect phenological traits

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the timing of biological events in plants

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONE
entities.description: The specific ecological regions where sesame cultivars are adopted

entities.name: SEED COAT COLOUR
entities.description: The pigmentation of the seed coat, including darker shades

entities.name: SDS-PAGE
entities.description: Sodium Dodecyl Sulphate Polyacrylamide Gel Electrophoresis used to reveal protein bands

entities.name: PROTEIN BANDS
entities.description: Specific protein markers with varied molecular weights, some of which are polymorphic

entities.name: DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of genetic or phenotypic difference between cultivars

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC STUDY
entities.description: The study of evolutionary relationships among biological entities
